focus: Deep-dive on P0/P1 findings from iter 1-10

selectedFindings.title: Replay hit-rate gate is mathematically impossible
selectedFindings.proposedPatch: Patch parent 020 to force child 005 to either align the replay shape with the 60% target or lower the target to match the fixed 20 unique + 10 repeats trace; also scope the 50 ms gate to cache-hit-only and relax the harness wall-clock target.

selectedFindings.title: Migration-safe cache reuse remains under-specified
selectedFindings.proposedPatch: Patch parent 020 so child 003 adds malformed-generation recovery and child 004 forbids fresh-looking cache reuse when freshness is not live, with an end-to-end stale-graph migration scenario.

selectedFindings.title: Copilot model-visible transport proof is not a ship gate
selectedFindings.proposedPatch: Patch parent 020 to require a committed fixture or captured artifact proving model-visible additionalContext for the supported Copilot runtime/version floor before SDK-default rollout; notification-only {} is insufficient.

deprioritized: 008 missing PostToolUse slice remains open but lower blast radius because Codex is a deferred parity expansion.
009 validation/manual-playbook and wrapper privacy wording remain open.
noveltyJustification: No new blocker class surfaced; the only net-new value was resolving the 011/012 disagreement in favor of the existing 005 P0 and turning the two highest-impact P1s into parent-ready patch text.
